4.title: Part IV — Now, The King Must Die

chapters.name: The Man with the Bug in His Arm
chapters.tip: Istuis - the high-tech hub of Eydtea - supplies the kingdoms with transportation and communication technologies, as well as military equipment.

chapters.name: The Silver Star
chapters.tip: Astrum is Anoleth's capital city, home to the Chrysalis - the oldest castle structure in the world, and seat of the King.

chapters.name: New Dawn
chapters.tip: The rebel group now known as New Dawn have warred with the Anolethic monarchy for close to a century and a half, inspired against the cruelty of the early kings of Anoleth.
